user.title: Signal Messenger API
user.description: Enter your signal-cli-rest-api details. The integration will automatically use WebSocket for real-time messages or fall back to REST polling.

account.title: Select Account
account.description: Select an existing account or choose to enter manually/register new.

register.title: Register New Number
register.description: ⚠️ EXPERIMENTAL: Register a new Signal number. This feature is experimental and may not work reliably.

data.use_voice: Use voice call instead of SMS

verify.title: Verify Number
verify.description: ⚠️ EXPERIMENTAL: Enter the verification code received via SMS or voice call. This feature is experimental and may not work reliably.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Signal API

init.title: Signal Settings
init.description: Choose an action to configure your Signal integration.

menu_option_descriptions.profile: Change your Signal display name and 'About' status.
menu_option_descriptions.conversation: Configure Home Assistant Assist bridge and authorization.

settings.title: General Settings
settings.description: Configure polling interval and select which contacts/groups should appear as sensors in Home Assistant.

conversation.title: Assist Authorization
conversation.description: Select specific contacts or groups that are allowed to trigger Home Assistant Assist commands via Signal.

data.enable_conversation: Enable Assist Integration (Bridge to Home Assistant Assist)
